title: Front Office Manager - ITC Hotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - ITC Hotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ITC Hotels! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
